title: CSV Data Processor
description: Build a CSV processor that can parse CSV text, filter rows by column values, sort by a column, and compute aggregate statistics (sum, average, min, max).
requirements: Parse CSV text into a structured table (headers + rows)
Support filtering rows by a column value predicate
Support sorting rows by a specific column (numeric or alphabetical)
Compute aggregate statistics on numeric columns
Display formatted output as an aligned table
hints: split(',') handles basic CSV parsing (without quoted fields)
Use iter().position() to find the index of a column by name
Closures as filter predicates give maximum flexibility to callers
partial_cmp() is needed for f64 since NaN makes Ord impossible
Track column widths for aligned display output
bonusChallenge: Support quoted fields with commas inside them. Add CSV file reading/writing. Implement group-by aggregation (like SQL GROUP BY).
